# Stock Procurement Customer

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:9a4ad3d4a000f49fd0ac050a05501acb921074480685acd3f1331e223ef78629
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module allows to store the customer on the procurement group.

The value will be transmitted to the picking at move assignation.

As it can differ from the delivered partner, it allows further computations like
grouping or not per customer, or...

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

This module does not work on its own but defines just a new field on procurement
group level.

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/stock-logistics-workflow/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/stock-logistics-workflow/issues/new?body=module:%20stock_procurement_customer%0Aversion:%2016.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_procurement_customer.models.stock_move.StockMove._get_new_picking_values
documentation:
Prepares a new picking for this move as it could not be assigned to
another picking.
Add the customer from the procurement group.

methods.name: odoo.addons.stock_procurement_customer.tests.test_stock_procurement_customer.TestProcurementCustomer.test_procurement

Create a move with a procurement group containing the customer
value.
